original text:
A team of Egyptian ladies collect at a deserted park in a Cairo residential area as soon as a week, climbing up wall surfaces and also leaping about in the laborious physical technique referred to as Parkour, while likewise testing the nation's conventional social standards.
Established In France in the 1980 s as the Art du Deplacement and also later on taking its name from the French word 'parcours' (program or course), Parkour includes running, climbing up and also leaping acrobatically around structures and also over surface.
The ladies have actually educated each week for the previous 6 months with the ultimate purpose of developing the very first expert Parkour group in Egypt.
10 ladies participated in last Friday's training, which concentrated on structure top body toughness and also various techniques of taking care of environments.
Interested groups, accustomed to ladies taking a reduced account in Egypt, typically gather together to enjoy the training, in some cases taking images and also shooting. Yet the ladies maintain the training unrestricted, firmly insisting that no sporting activity is unique for males.
" It is all-natural that individuals did decline it since they were not utilized to it," claimed Zayneb Helal, among the gamers.
" They did decline the suggestion that women might play sporting activities, not to mention on the road," she included.
It is unusual for ladies to play such sporting activities on the roads in Egypt. A 2017 Thomson Reuters Structure study of professionals on exactly how ladies got on in huge cities ranked Cairo as the globe's most unsafe megacity for ladies, while London appeared as finest.
Directed by trainer Mohamed Omran, ladies educate hard on climbing up challenges, touchdown appropriately after dives and also seeing possibilities in structures around them.
" Females are currently educating and also much more ladies are beginning to come," Omran claimed. "As the sporting activity spreads out the approval of ladies educating boosts and also it is not uncommon for ladies to have a group and also train," he included.
Parkour is played by males in Egypt however the sporting activity is ignored and also has no regulative body. Parkour Egypt, a team that makes up males and females, has actually expanded greatly after starting with a handful of gamers.
In 2015 Britain ended up being the very first nation formally to identify Parkour as a sporting activity.
" It requires even more time to develop and also the sporting activity has to spread out that individuals would certainly discover it," Helal claimed.

original text: Nils Leonard has spent over 20 years in the advertising and design industries working at a number of the most recognised agencies in London. In 2017, he founded the Uncommon Creative Studio alongside Lucy Jameson and Natalie Graeme, which aims to be "a creative studio building brands the real world is happy exists". The studio is currently working with ITV, Google, WWF, and Ovo Energy, and is also launching its own brands. Prior to forming Uncommon, Leonard was CCO and Chairman of Grey London, where he oversaw the most profitable and awarded years in the agency's history.
processed_text:
Nils Leonard has spent over 20 years in the advertising and design industries working at a number of the most recognised agencies in London.
In 2017, he founded the Uncommon Creative Studio alongside Lucy Jameson and Natalie Graeme, which aims to be "a creative studio building brands the real world is happy exists".
The studio is currently working with ITV, Google, WWF, and Ovo Energy, and is also launching its own brands.
Prior to forming Uncommon, Leonard was CCO and Chairman of Grey London, where he oversaw the most profitable and awarded years in the agency's history.

original text:
Pierogi don't always have to be slathered in butter an onions. They also make a great hash brown!
Try eating pierogi for breakfast, like this guy from Twitter who posted a pic of his breakfast. I've done the pierogi this way before and I promise you won't be disappointed.
When the water boils, cover and let steam until all the water is evaporated.
Decision time - You may add tablespoon of butter to brown the pierogi in or you can just blister the outside dough in the hot pan like the picture.
Serve these delicious sides with sausage or bacon and eggs. ENJOY!
Thank you to @davekooi for this great picture - see the original at TwitPic.com. If you have pictures of different ways to make pierogi, tweet it to us @PolishPierogi or post it on our Facebook page and we will add it to our blog!

original text:
New Japan Pro Wrestling has announced ticket information for their New Beginning USA Tour event on January 30th, 2019 at the Globe Theatre in Los Angeles, CA.
The East Coast-based promotion Game Changer Wrestling announced earlier today that they will be making their return to Southern California on March 2nd, 2019 in Los Angeles, CA.
Smash Global 8: Night of Champions took place at the Taglyan Complex in Los Angeles, CA. Click for results.
Bellator MMA returns to the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, CA for Bellator 220: Koreshkov vs. Larkin on March 29th, 2019.
History has repeated itself. The Ultimate Fighting Championship has canceled its upcoming January 26th, 2019 event in Anaheim, CA.

The East Coast-based promotion Game Changer Wrestling announced earlier today that they will be making their return to Southern California on March 2nd, 2019 in Los Angeles, CA.
Smash Global 8: Night of Champions took place at the Taglyan Complex in Los Angeles, CA.
Click for results.
Bellator MMA returns to the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, CA for Bellator 220: Koreshkov vs. Larkin on March 29th, 2019.
History has repeated itself.
The Ultimate Fighting Championship has canceled its upcoming January 26th, 2019 event in Anaheim, CA.

original text:
Comms-care recently attended and sponsored this year's CRN Golf Challenge at the well known East Sussex National Golf Resort and Spa. In their third consecutive year of sponsoring the event, Comms-care also entered a team of four to play the East Course; designed by one of Jack Nicklaus' course architects and host to two European Opens.
No strangers to world class golf courses after this year's Comms-care Partner Golf Day at the 2010 Ryder Cup course, the Comms-care team were in good form. Teeing off at 10:00am with a prompt shotgun start, scoring was based on the best two scores from each hole. The 1st nine holes of the course were challenging with torrential rain proving a difficult obstacle but conditions improved on the back nine and the team managed to accumulate an impressive 91.
With a score of 91, the team were quietly confident that they had secured a decent placed finish and during the awards it was announced there had been a few teams that had managed scores in the nineties but the winning team managed a very impressive 101 which highlighted the quality of golf being played.
processed_text:
Comms-care recently attended and sponsored this year's CRN Golf Challenge at the well known East Sussex National Golf Resort and Spa.
In their third consecutive year of sponsoring the event, Comms-care also entered a team of four to play the East Course; designed by one of Jack Nicklaus' course architects and host to two European Opens.
No strangers to world class golf courses after this year's Comms-care Partner Golf Day at the 2010 Ryder Cup course, the Comms-care team were in good form.
Teeing off at 10:00am with a prompt shotgun start, scoring was based on the best two scores from each hole.
The 1st nine holes of the course were challenging with torrential rain proving a difficult obstacle but conditions improved on the back nine and the team managed to accumulate an impressive 91.
With a score of 91, the team were quietly confident that they had secured a decent placed finish and during the awards it was announced there had been a few teams that had managed scores in the nineties but the winning team managed a very impressive 101 which highlighted the quality of golf being played.

Cookies are the small pieces of information which will be stored in the cache memory of a browser. Please note that we DO NOT collect any cookies personally but our third party services and joint network partners may use them for positive purposes. These Network Partners will only use Non Personal Information of visitor. It excludes your name, email address, logged in details and phone number. After visiting filerabit.com, you're agreeing with our cookies policy.
However, find complete details about how Google is using cookies and how to opt-out from them. Google shows further details about advertising on http://www.google.com/policies/technologies/ads/. Find privacy details for Google Partners on http://www.google.com/intl/en/policies/privacy/partners/.
Google Analytics is the 2nd biggest third party service which is currently using by us. Analytics is using cookies in different names like (utma, utmt, utmb, utmc, utmv and utmz) to analyze our website. Google Analytics will proceed visitor information in cookies format and will be stored in Google servers USA. The information includes the non personal information including IP address. After proceeding information, Analytics will finalized results about the usage of our website after proceeding data. The data and information will be shown to authorized administrators and operators.
The 6 cookie name set that was mentioned above will may be transfer to third parties under the law and policies of Google Analytics. The basic purpose of proceeding the cookies to give ultimate results about performance and visitor behavior to website owners. Google Analytics has its own policies, you may visit and read all information.
If you want to opt-out from tracking and do not share your data to analytics so visit https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout link to safeguard data. Google published a helpful article about safeguarding your data on https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/6004245.
We are going to share some helpful links that includes all important information about cookies. We will request you to please read and follow the instructions. It will provide some information about how to opting-out from different internet browsers. How to control, manage and delete cookies from different web browser. 1- http://www.aboutcookies.org/, 2-http://www.allaboutcookies.org/.
Time to time changes will be taken place in our cookies policy. A humble request to our visitors to please check this page randomly to know any necessary changes in cookies policy. Thanks for your cooperation with us.

original text:
2NE1 members thank their Filipino fans for the support.
2NE1 members CL, Minzy, Dara, and Bom attended an open presscon for their All Or Nothing tour at the Shangrila Plaza on Friday, May 17. The Korean pop stars were welcomed by the members of the press and their fans who flocked to the event.
Dara, more popularly known as Sandara Park in the country, remarked that she is truly elated by the warm welcome that their group has been receiving from the Filipinos. She added that they are happy to be celebrating their fifth anniversary in the country.
"Masaya kami na dito kami nag-celebrate ng aming anniversary. Maraming saalamat sa inyong lahat," Dara said. She added that she truly misses her fans in the Philippines. "Na-miss ko kayo sobra. Ang galing ng pag-welcome niyo sa amin. Ito ang hinihintay ko talaga," Dara said.
Dara who rose to fame in the Philippines via Star Circle Quest before being part of the girl group remarked that they would love to be back in the Philippines soon. "Maraming salamat sa pagpunta niyo. Maraming salamat sa pagsuporta niyo sa amin. Babalik kami dito. Mahal namin kayo," she said.
processed_text:

2NE1 members CL, Minzy, Dara, and Bom attended an open presscon for their All Or Nothing tour at the Shangrila Plaza on Friday, May 17.
The Korean pop stars were welcomed by the members of the press and their fans who flocked to the event.
Dara, more popularly known as Sandara Park in the country, remarked that she is truly elated by the warm welcome that their group has been receiving from the Filipinos.
She added that they are happy to be celebrating their fifth anniversary in the country.
"Masaya kami na dito kami nag-celebrate ng aming anniversary.
Maraming saalamat sa inyong lahat," Dara said.
She added that she truly misses her fans in the Philippines.
"Na-miss ko kayo sobra.
Ang galing ng pag-welcome niyo sa amin.
Ito ang hinihintay ko talaga," Dara said.
Dara who rose to fame in the Philippines via Star Circle Quest before being part of the girl group remarked that they would love to be back in the Philippines soon.
"Maraming salamat sa pagpunta niyo.
Maraming salamat sa pagsuporta niyo sa amin.
Babalik kami dito.
Mahal namin kayo," she said.
